# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservices-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservices-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-a
        image: myrepo/service-a:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
      - name: service-b
        image: myrepo/service-b:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: microservices-app
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
    name: service-a
  - port: 81
    targetPort: 8081
    name: service-b
  selector:
    app: microservices-app
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: microservices-app-ingress
spec:
  rules:
  - host: microservices-demo.local
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: microservices-app
            port:
              number: 80
      - path: /service-b
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: microservices-app
            port:
              number: 81
